content.en:
Wasteland, on a small barren mountain.

Ye Tian suddenly appeared here.

For the first time, Ye Tian hid his breath and immediately observed the surrounding situation.

"Nothing powerful, just weak creatures!"

Ye Tian was relieved.

"The space of the wasteland is very stable, even more stable than the void in the outside world, and even the original chaotic small world is not as stable as here, no wonder so many supremes have been born!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Moreover, the vitality of the wasteland is also extremely rich and pure.

If you cultivate here, you will be many times faster than cultivating in the outside world.

"Let's take a look at what races are nearby, according to what the Divine Blade Supreme said, most of the Zichen trees are controlled by the races of the wasteland, and the ownerless Zichen trees are relatively rare. Therefore, the most direct way is to plunder the purple wood of one race, and it is best to find a weak race!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he flew in one direction, looking for traces of the race.

Soon, Ye Tian discovered an emperor-level creature.

The creature was about three meters tall and covered in green, otherwise resembling a Terran.

"Copy the talent, check!"

Swish!

The talent of this creature appeared in Ye Tian's eyes.

Greenskins: Akina

Cultivation talent: Dawn level

Defense Talents: Top

Speed talent: Medium

Strength Talents: Top

Photosynthetic talent: Top

Claw Talent: Top

......

In terms of talent, this is just an extremely ordinary emperor-level, and the talent is also very average, the only good thing is that the cultivation talent is okay, and he can cultivate to the god-level level.

Wow!

Ye Tian appeared in front of the green-skinned Aguna, and before Aguna could react, he immediately cast a hypnotic talent on it.

Ye Tian's immortal soul was so powerful, Aguna's soul was too weak in his eyes, and he instantly hypnotized the other party and controlled the other party's soul.

Immediately, he began to ask Aguna all sorts of questions.

Soon, Ye Tian learned some important information from Aguna.

Aguna is an ordinary clansman in the greenskins, and the greenskins are not strong in the wasteland, and the strongest is only at the galaxy level, and there are very few galaxy levels, and the great god level is enough to be called a high-level among the greenskins.

"Is there a purple wood among the greenskins?"

Ye Tian asked.

"What is Zichenmu?"

Aguna asked curiously.

“......"

Ye Tian was stunned.

Obviously, not everyone knows Zichenmu in the wasteland, and many weak creatures obviously haven't heard of Zichenmu, and only some strong people should know about Zichenmu.

And Aguna is only at the emperor level, and she can't touch a treasure like Zichenmu.

"Take me to the Greenskins!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

Aguna replied.

In a hypnotic state, he couldn't resist Ye Tian at all, and took Ye Tian to the Greenskin Clan.

The Greenskins he belongs to are not the headquarters of the Greenskins, but just a tribe of the Greenskins, and the leader of the tribe is only a true god.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the tribe of the Greenskin Clan, and immediately used his hypnotic talent to control the true god of the Greenskin tribe.

Then he learned some information from the true god.

The Greenskins did own the Purple Chenshu a long time ago, but that was a long time ago, and there was only one Purple Chenshu, but the Greenskins do not have a Purple Chenshu now.

The heart of the Purple Chenshu is the Purple Chenmu, but as long as the Purple Chenmu is taken away according to a certain method, the Purple Chenshu will not die, but it will take a long time to recover before continuing to give birth to the Purple Chenmu.

As long as the greenskins take good care of this purple tree, they will have a steady stream of purple trees.

It's a pity that a long time ago, the Purple Chenshu of the Greenskin Clan was taken away by another race.

"Red Forest!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Red Forest Clan snatched the Zichen Tree from the Green Skins, but the Red Forest Race did not dare to destroy the Green Skins, because the Green Skins were a race created by a dominant-level innate god.

The Red Forest Clan can snatch the Purple Tree, but if they destroy the Greenskin Clan, it will undoubtedly offend the Master.

And in the wasteland, there is an unwritten rule, that is, there can be wars between races, they can grab resources, they can intrigue, they can do anything, but they can't exterminate the race.

"Does the Greenskin Clan have a purple Chenmu?"

Ye Tian asked again.

The true god of the greenskin clan said: "Maybe there is, I can't be sure!"

Seeing that he couldn't ask anything more, Ye Tian left the tribe and went to the headquarters of the Greenskin Clan.

He guessed that the Greenskins should have remnants of the Purple Chenwood, after all, the Greenskins have existed for many years, even if there is only one Purple Chenshu, they have slowly accumulated some Purple Chenwood.

And the greenskin clan is not strong, and the speed of consuming purple wood is definitely not fast.

Therefore, the greenskins must have remnants of purple wood.

If it was some powerful race, Ye Tian would definitely not dare to provoke it, but the greenskin race was too weak, and it only had a galaxy-level control, not even a cosmic god.

So.

He could have broken into the Greenskin Clan's headquarters and snatched the remaining Zichenmu.

......

Greenskin Headquarters.

The leader of the Greenskin Clan, Otter Bone, was cultivating when suddenly a person appeared in front of him.

This person is Ye Tian!

"Who?"

The leader of the Greenskin Clan sensed Ye Tian's presence and was about to make a move.

Rumble!!!

The terrifying pressure hit the greenskin leader and made it impossible for the greenskin leader to resist at all, and it was difficult to even move.

He was too weak, just a very ordinary galaxy-level, and in Ye Tian's eyes, he was an ant.

"Who are you......"

The otter bone looked at Ye Tian in horror and said.

"Hand over Zi Chenmu, I don't want to kill you!"

Ye Tiandao.

"We Greenskin Clan don't have Purple Chenmu, our Purple Chenshu has long been snatched away by the Red Forest Clan, this is a well-known thing! You can go to the Red Forest Clan, they have three Zichen Trees!"

"Don't talk nonsense, if you don't have Zi Chenmu, then go and die!"

Ye Tian was about to start, but the otter bone hurriedly said: "Yes, I have Zichenmu, don't kill me!"

Under the threat of death, the otter bone confessed.

Then.

The otter bone took Ye Tian to the treasure house of the Greenskin Clan, because Zi Chenmu was hidden in the treasure house.

Among the greenskins, only the patriarch can enter the treasury.

Soon, Ye Tian entered the treasure house of the Greenskin Clan.

But the moment he entered the treasure house, the otter bone suddenly burst out laughing.

"Haha, you dare to enter the treasure house of our greenskins, don't you know that the treasury of our greenskins has a formation arranged by the ancestral gods, you are dead!"

Otter Bone sneered.
